title: Backend Developer Vacancy at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
